title: Barriers in Improving Education Quality: A Case Study of Rural India

summary.about: The causes of poor education quality in a low-literacy village in Uttar Pradesh.
summary.audience: Local education officials, schools, NGOs and rural-development planners.
summary.method: Uses a village-school case study and gathers perspectives from the different groups involved in education.
summary.insights: Solutions must respond to each stakeholder’s barriers while improving participation and introducing practical digital-classroom support.
